0.q: PsnMLP328 might regulate the cadmium ion concentration and resistance to cadmium stress in plants by regulating the activities of various metal-ion transporters.

1.q: Under NaCl and HT conditions, intense coloring was observed in the WT leaves after NBT, DAB, and Evans blue staining, in contrast to light staining in the transgenic lines.
